blended.narrative: Stratton is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 380 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
